name: 脉冲手枪（移动触发）
description: 当敌人移动时，对自身Chebyshev距离≤2范围内随机1名敌人造成等同于攻击力的伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.rulePiece; var trigger = context.sourcePiece; if (!caster) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!trigger) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (trigger.ownerPlayerId === caster.ownerPlayerId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0 && Math.max(Math.abs(p.x - caster.x), Math.abs(p.y - caster.y)) <= 2; }); if (enemies.length === 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; var target = enemies[Math.floor(Math.random() * enemies.length)]; var result = dealDamage(caster, target, caster.attack, 'physical', battle, 'pulse-pistol-move'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的脉冲手枪触发，对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害' }; }
